metadata.service_area: Garfield County, CO (08045) — Glenwood Springs, Carbondale, New Castle, Silt, Rifle, Parachute, Battlement Mesa
notes: Hand-curated roster of LOCALLY-administered PBV properties that do not appear in CHFA / HUD MF / USDA RD federal feeds.

Properties already covered by CHFA LIHTC or HUD MF (e.g. Benedict, Rifle Apartments, Aster Place, Canyon Vista) are NOT duplicated here — the federal record already exists with full metadata. Adding them again would create double-count in opportunity-finder market scans.
Coordinates are geocoded from street address via US Census batch geocoder. lat/lng accuracy: rooftop or street-level.

properties.notes: 20-unit senior PBV property. PBV contract is scheduled to sunset in 2027, after which units may revert to market-rate without re-up. Original gap that triggered this curated supplement.
